tasks.subject: Task 0: Dependencies & Config Scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Windows-only crate dependencies and platform-aware socket path.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandd/Cargo.toml
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/config.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/Cargo.toml", "crates/ahandd/src/config.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["windows-sys and zip are conditional deps", "ipc_socket_path returns Named Pipe path on Windows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Cross-Platform File Permissions Module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create fs_perms.rs with restrict_owner_only and restrict_owner_and_group.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/ahandd/src/fs_perms.rs
- Create: crates/ahandd/src/lib.rs
- Create: crates/ahandd/tests/fs_perms_test.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/fs_perms.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/lib.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/fs_perms_test.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd --test fs_perms_test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["restrict_owner_only sets 0o600 on Unix", "Windows uses SetNamedSecurityInfoW ACL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: DPAPI Key Encryption Module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create dpapi.rs with protect/unprotect for Windows key encryption.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/ahandd/src/dpapi.rs
- Create: crates/ahandd/tests/dpapi_test.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/dpapi.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/dpapi_test.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["protect returns encrypted bytes", "unprotect returns original", "module only compiles on Windows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: IPC Server Refactor — Generic + Windows Named Pipes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor ipc.rs to generic AsyncRead/AsyncWrite + Windows Named Pipe server with peer identity.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/ipc.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/ipc.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["serve_ipc dispatches by platform", "handle_ipc_conn is generic", "Windows peer identity via Win32 API", "Unix behavior unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: IPC Client Refactor — Extract ipc_connect()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract cross-platform ipc_connect() and replace 5 UnixStream::connect calls.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandctl/src/main.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandctl/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ipc_connect returns impl AsyncRead+AsyncWrite", "all 5 IPC functions use ipc_connect", "no direct UnixStream usage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Signal Handling & Process Management
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cross-platform daemon shutdown and process lifecycle.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/main.rs
- Modify: crates/ahandctl/src/daemon.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/main.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/daemon.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandd -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Windows uses ctrl_c", "tasklist/taskkill on Windows", "CREATE_NO_WINDOW daemon start", "find_ahandd_binary handles .exe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Device Identity & OpenClaw Permissions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Integrate fs_perms and DPAPI into key storage and openclaw files.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/device_identity.rs
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/exec_approvals.rs
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/pairing.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/device_identity.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/exec_approvals.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/pairing.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["save uses fs_perms", "Windows key content DPAPI-encrypted", "load DPAPI-decrypts on Windows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: browser-init Windows Adaptation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make browser-init work on Windows: Node.js .zip, Chrome/Edge detection, taskkill clean.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/browser_init.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/browser_init.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["install_node downloads .zip on Windows", "detect_system_chrome checks Windows paths", "clean uses taskkill on Windows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Upgrade Rust Rewrite & Admin Bash Removal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite upgrade in Rust, remove bash dependency from admin.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahandctl/src/upgrade.rs
- Modify: crates/ahandctl/src/admin.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandctl/src/upgrade.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/admin.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/browser_init.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upgrade works without bash", "supports --check and --version", "admin browser setup no bash", "Windows .exe handling"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: install.ps1 & ahandctl install-daemon
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PowerShell install script and Rust install-daemon subcommand.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/dist/install.ps1
- Modify: crates/ahandctl/src/main.rs
- Create: crates/ahandctl/src/install_daemon.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dist/install.ps1", "crates/ahandctl/src/main.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/install_daemon.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["install.ps1 downloads and verifies binaries", "install.ps1 adds to PATH", "install-daemon subcommand works cross-platform"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: CI Workflows — Windows Build & Test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Windows to release build matrix and create cross-platform test workflow.

**Files:**
- Modify: .github/workflows/release-rust.yml
- Create: .github/workflows/test-rust.yml

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/release-rust.yml", ".github/workflows/test-rust.yml"], "verifyCommand": "yamllint .github/workflows/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Windows build target in release", "protoc install for Windows", ".exe artifact handling", "test workflow runs on 3 OSes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: IPC Integration Tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full IPC roundtrip integration tests on both platforms.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/ahandd/tests/ipc_roundtrip.rs
- Modify: crates/ahandd/src/lib.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/tests/ipc_roundtrip.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd --test ipc_roundtrip", "acceptanceCriteria": ["JobRequest→JobFinished roundtrip", "caller_uid format verified per platform", "SessionQuery roundtrip", "same test code both platforms"]}
```
